# ToolkitFree

> Free browser-based image utilities. File contents are processed locally and are not uploaded for processing.

## Capability notes

- Guaranteed converter inputs and outputs: JPG/JPEG, PNG, WebP.
- Browser-dependent converter inputs: GIF, BMP, SVG. GIF conversion exports one static frame.
- Not currently supported: HEIC input, TIFF input, GIF output.
- Large-file preflight checks file count, encoded size, pixels, and estimated working memory. Risky inputs warn before processing; a single image above 100 million pixels is blocked.
- Quality compression may not produce a smaller file; when no smaller same-dimension result exists, the original is kept. Target mode verifies the actual output size and reports whether the selected maximum was met.
- Batch processing is available in Converter, Compressor, Resizer, and Image to PDF. Cropper, Favicon Generator, and Background Remover process one image at a time.
- Converter batches keep successful outputs when individual files fail and de-duplicate output filenames.
- Converter, Compressor, and Resizer show per-file failures and can download successful results individually or in one locally generated ZIP.
- File contents stay on the device. The site still requests normal site assets and advertising resources. Background Remover also downloads model files.

## Navigation

- Primary navigation groups tools under Image tools and Create & export; smaller screens use an accessible Menu control.

## Main tools

<!-- Generated from src/data/tool-registry.ts by scripts/sync-llms-registry.mjs. -->
- [Image Converter](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/): Convert JPG, PNG, and WebP images in your browser, with clearly labeled browser-dependent inputs.
- [Image Compressor](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-compressor/): Re-encode or resize images and compare the actual result; smaller output is not guaranteed.
- [Image Resizer](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-resizer/): Resize images to custom dimensions or verified platform presets while controlling aspect ratio.
- [Image Enhancer](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-enhancer/): Adjust brightness, contrast, saturation, sharpness, blur, and grayscale locally with a live preview.
- [Image Collage Maker](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-collage/): Combine JPG, PNG, or WebP images into a grid, side-by-side stitch, or vertical collage locally in your browser.
- [Image Cropper](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-cropper/): Crop one JPG, PNG, or WebP with visual, touch, and keyboard controls.
- [Background Remover](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/background-remover/): Remove one image background locally after downloading the browser AI model and runtime.
- [Image to PDF](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-to-pdf/): Combine ordered JPG, PNG, or WebP images into a PDF with page size, orientation, and margin controls.
- [Favicon Generator](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/favicon-generator/): Generate five PNG favicon sizes and a site.webmanifest from one image.
- [QR Code Generator](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/qr-generator/): Create PNG or SVG QR codes for text, URLs, WiFi, and vCards with contrast-aware downloads.

## Supported converter pages

- [JPG to PNG](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/jpg-to-png/)
- [PNG to JPG](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/png-to-jpg/)
- [WebP to JPG](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/webp-to-jpg/)
- [JPG to WebP](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/jpg-to-webp/)
- [PNG to WebP](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/png-to-webp/)
- [WebP to PNG](https://toolkitfree.net/tools/image-converter/webp-to-png/)

- [Reduce Image Size](https://toolkitfree.net/guides/reduce-image-size/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://toolkitfree.net/privacy-policy/)
- [About](https://toolkitfree.net/about/)
